displayName: Lumi production: comprehension audio security failure

conditions.displayName: Audio validation, retention, cleanup or signing failed

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND (jsonPayload.message="comprehensionAudio.retention.pathRejected" OR jsonPayload.message="comprehensionAudio.retention.deleteFailed" OR jsonPayload.message="comprehensionAudio.pendingCleanup.failed" OR jsonPayload.message="comprehensionAudio.validator.failed" OR jsonPayload.message="Comprehension audio validator unavailable" OR jsonPayload.message="getComprehensionAudioUrl sign failed" OR textPayload:"comprehensionAudio.retention.pathRejected" OR textPayload:"comprehensionAudio.retention.deleteFailed" OR textPayload:"comprehensionAudio.pendingCleanup.failed" OR textPayload:"comprehensionAudio.validator.failed" OR textPayload:"Comprehension audio validator unavailable" OR textPayload:"getComprehensionAudioUrl sign failed")

documentation.content: Check the isolated validator, pending/canonical object generations, retention cleanup and signer IAM. Treat a rejected stored path as a security event. Do not download or share a real child's recording during triage unless strictly necessary and authorised.
